filtered_articles.title: Save Nearly 40% Off the Sony WH-1000XM6 Noise Canceling Headphones for Father's Day
filtered_articles.description: These are refurbished units that are indistinguishable from new and include a 2 year warranty.

filtered_articles.title: Amazon's 3 for $33 4K Movie Sale Has a Bunch of Classic Dad Flicks for Father's Day
filtered_articles.description: Amazon has brought back its popular 3 for $33 4K Blu-ray sale and it's filled with films aimed at dads. There are a total of 39 movies included in this promotion, so check out the list with Father's Day gifts in mind.
